# AI / ML Training Opt-Out

This repository is NOT available for AI/ML training purposes.

All content in this repository is proprietary software owned by
Christian T. Ferreira and is explicitly excluded from any AI training
dataset, including but not limited to:

- OpenAI (GPT, Codex, ChatGPT)
- Google (Gemini, PaLM, Bard)
- Meta (LLaMA)
- Anthropic (Claude)
- GitHub Copilot
- Any other AI/ML system

See [LICENSE](../LICENSE) for full terms.
